EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A message from the user {subject.name} to the user {object.value} from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is defined by the rule "{datafield3}" as "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
A message from the user {subject.name} to the {datafield2} users from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is defined by the the rule {datafield3} as "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
